history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person takes a mirror selfie indoors while standing beside a black rolling suitcase.

Main Subject:
A single person is reflected in a large mirror, holding a phone near their face. They stand with one hand raised behind their head and the other hand holding the phone, looking toward the phone with a neutral expression.

Setting:
The scene is indoors in a modern room with a marble-pattern floor and white walls. The time of day appears to be daytime due to bright natural-looking light entering from a large window or glass door on the right. A framed abstract artwork hangs on the wall behind them. A chair is positioned behind and slightly to the right of the person near a small table.

Visual Details:
The person wears a gray-and-black textured hoodie or pullover with a zipper-like detail and layered dark trim around the neckline. They also wear loose, light-colored jeans with visible colorful patches or prints. Their hair is dark and styled with volume, and their face is partially covered by the raised phone. The phone screen is visible as a dark rectangle. In the foreground, a black suitcase with a ribbed or segmented body stands near the mirror and extends upward in the reflection. The suitcase has an extended handle. The mirror frames the image with dark edges, and the floor shows a black-and-white geometric marble pattern. Lighting is soft and bright, with reflections from the glass and the mirror.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person standing in front of a mirror and holding a phone for a selfie. A black rolling suitcase is placed near the mirror on a marble-pattern floor, with an abstract framed picture and furniture visible in the background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text detected in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** None found / not legible

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to show a person taking a mirror selfie indoors (no readable UI labels, captions, signage, or document text present).

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with black hair is taking a selfie in a modern, luxurious hotel lobby. He's wearing a grey ribbed quarter-zip hoodie, a silver chain necklace, loose-fitting distressed denim jeans with a plaid shirt tied around the waist, and black sneakers. He has a black backpack on.

In front of him, to his right, is a black Rimowa suitcase. To his left, a silver luggage handle is visible. The background features a large, abstract black and white painting on the wall. A sleek black console table with a lamp sits beneath the painting. The floor is a striking black and white geometric marble pattern. To the right of the frame, floor-to-ceiling windows with vertical blinds and dark frames are visible. The lighting is bright and even, creating a clean, contemporary atmosphere. The overall mood is chic and stylish, suggesting travel and a sense of arrival or departure. The shot is taken from a slightly low angle, emphasizing the man and his surroundings.
